mnemonics: B.E.A.N.S. for Class Components: Behaviors (methods), Elements (variables), A New (keyword), Name (class name), Structure (blueprint)
keyPoints: A class is a blueprint for creating objects
Objects are instances of a class created with the 'new' keyword
commonMistakes: Forgetting to use 'new' keyword when creating objects
Confusing class variables with instance variables
Not following Java naming conventions (classes start with uppercase)
